description: This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Nakodu. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
name: Recipe: Elixir of Major Shadow Power

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Recipe: Elixir of Major Shadow Power Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Alchemy (350) Requires Lower City - Revered Use: Teaches you how to make an Elixir of Major Shadow Power. Sell Price: 2 Elixir of Major Shadow Power Item Level 70 Requires Level 60 Use: Increases shadow spell damage by up to 55 for 1 hour. Battle Elixir. (3 Sec Cooldown) Max Stack: 20 Sell Price: 60 Requires Ancient Lichen , Nightmare Vine , Imbued Vial This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Nakodu. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
